name: PRISMA-S
description: PRISMA extension for reporting literature searches in systematic reviews.

items.title: Database name
items.description: Name each individual database searched, stating the platform for each.

items.title: Multi-database searching
items.description: If databases were searched simultaneously on a single platform, state the name of the platform and list the databases searched together.

items.title: Online resources and browsing
items.description: Describe any online or print resources searched, and the date of last search.

items.title: Citation searching
items.description: Indicate whether cited references or citing references were examined, and describe any methods used for forward and backward citation searching.

items.title: Contacts
items.description: Indicate whether additional studies or data were sought by contacting authors, experts, manufacturers, or others.

items.title: Other methods
items.description: Describe any additional information sources or search methods used.

items.title: Full search strategies
items.description: Include the search strategies for each database and information source, copied and pasted exactly as run.

items.title: Limits and restrictions
items.description: Specify any restrictions to the search such as date or language limits.

items.title: Search filters
items.description: Indicate any search filters used and their source; cite the filter or provide a reference.

items.title: Prior work
items.description: Indicate when search strategies from other literature reviews were adapted or reused, citing the original.

items.title: Updates
items.description: Report the methods used to update the search.

items.title: Dates of searches
items.description: For each search, report the date(s) on which the search was conducted.

items.title: Total records
items.description: Document the total number of records identified from each database and other information sources.

items.title: Deduplication
items.description: Describe the processes and any software used to deduplicate records from multiple database searches and other sources.

items.title: Peer review
items.description: Describe any search peer review process (e.g. PRESS).
